cards.rules_text:
[i]Roll – [/i]Fish can't be blocked if you have less then three cards in hand.
[i]More Ammo – [/i]Whenever Fish deals combat damage to a player, draw a card, then discard a card unless you have three or less cards in hand.

[i]Inaccurate – [/i]Steroids must attack each combat. 
[i]Dual Wielding – [/i]Each Equipment attached to Steroids has an additional instance of each of its abilities.

Vigilance
[i]Heat [/i]– Whenever Rogue attacks, target opponent creates a 1/1 tapped white Human Soldier creature token.
[i]Blast Armor[/i] – When Rogue dies, she deals 2 damage to each creature. Until end of turn, if a creature dealt damage this way would die, exile it.

Deathtouch
[i]More Mutation –[/i]When Horror enters, you get two rad counters.
[i]Radiation Beam [/i]– When Horror attacks, you may exile a card in your graveyard put there from anywhere this turn. Create a copy of it. You may cast the copy. When you do, each player gets rad counters equal to its mana value.

Vigilance
[i]Sees In The Dark[/i] – Whenever you attack or are attacked, surveil 1. [i](Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)[/i]
[i]Telekinesis –[/i] {T}: Target creature attacks this turn if able. When it deals combat damage to a player this turn, draw two cards, then discard a card.
Whenever a player is dealt damage, they get that many rad counters.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“Gun smoke in the air / Friend weeping in pain / Blood pools everywhere / It's pouring acid rain / Our homes destroyed / Wishing this to end.”[/i]

cards.rules_text:
[i]Can Spawn Allies [/i]– When this creature enters, create twice X 2/2 black Mutant Survivor tokens with decayed. You lose X life. [i](It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)[/i]
[i]Portals Heal[/i] – Whenever a land you control enters, up to one target creature gains lifelink until end of turn.

[i]Fire Faster [/i]– Haste
[i]Pop Pop![/i] – Whenever you cast a Equipment spell or cast a spell during combat, you may discard a card. When you do, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for it.

Flash
[i]More Health [/i]– Crystal enters with a shield counter. [i](If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)[/i]
[i]Shield [/i]– Unblocked creatures attacking you have no abilities.

Trample
[i]Throw Weapon – [/i]Whenever Chicken attacks, if she's equipped, she deals 2 damage to each opponent. 
[i]Hard to Kill[/i] – When Chicken dies, if she's dealt damage to a player this turn, create a token copy of her.

[i]Faster[/i] – You may play an additional land as long as Plant entered this turn.
[i]Snare [/i]– {3}: Put a +1/+1 counter on Plant. It must be blocked this turn if able.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Plant can hold RMB to see further.[/i]

cards.rules_text: Decayed [i](This creature can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)[/i]

Whenever Melting enters or attacks, mill two cards.
[i]Corpse Explosion –[/i]Whenever Melting attacks, you may exile a creature card from a graveyard. If you do, each player loses 2 life.
You may reveal a legendary card you own from outside the game and put it into your hand. Exile Epic Encounter.

Indestructible
When the Nuclear Throne enters or attacks, it deals 10 damage to up to one nonplayer target. Each player gets rad counters equal to the excess damage dealt this way. 
At the beginning of your upkeep, if there are twenty or more cards in graveyards, the Nuclear Throne becomes a creature.

Whenever a creature you control enters, you may exile an Aura card you control from outside the game. You may cast it without paying its mana cost if it has mana value equal to or less than that creature. Otherwise, put it into your hand.

Each player may shuffle their hand and graveyard into their library, then draw seven cards. Each player who did may put a permanent card from their hand onto the battlefield. 
Exile Loop.

When Throne II enters, it deals 4 damage to each other creature.
Whenever a permanent card is put into a graveyard, each player gets a rad counter.
{20}: Shuffle your hand and graveyard into your library, then draw seven cards. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each card in your graveyard. Activate only as a sorcery.

Whenever a opponent casts a spell, put +1/+1 counters on Lil Hunter equal to that spell's mana value unless that spell's controller has Lil Hunter deal that much damage to them.
When Lil Hunter dies, he deals damage to each opponent equal to his power.

Ward {3}
Cards can't leave exile.
Cards can't leave graveyards.
Cards can't leave libraries outside of draw steps.

cards.type: Legendary Creature – Mutant Dog Dog Dog
cards.rules_text:
Big Dog enters tapped with three stun counters on him.
Whenever a nontoken creature dies, untap Big Dog. 
Whenever Big Dog attacks, create a 2/2 tapped and attacking red Missile artifact creature token for each creature that died this turn.
Double strike
cards.flavor_text: [i]Gossip spreads quickly in terrified communities. Fear travels between the trees and the valleys. A demon, fallen from the Sky, mighty enough to slay Providence and his Wurms. Only two arms, two legs- but with twenty two, unblinking, crimson eyes. [/i]

Loader has first strike as long as she entered this turn.
Whenever Loader deals combat damage to a player, until your next turn, double all damage that would be dealt to that player, and spells you cast that target them cost {2} less.

When this creature enters, create a 2/2 Construct artifact creature token.
Whenever Engineer becomes the target of a spell you control, for each creature token you control, you may copy that spell. The copy targets that token.

Whenever another creature dies, Bandit connives. [i](Draw a card, then discard a card. If you discarded a nonland card, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature.)[/i]
{6}: Bandit can't be blocked this turn. This costs {1} less for each nonland card put into a graveyard this turn.

Flash

• Counter target noncreature spell.
• One or two target permanents phases out. [i](Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.)[/i]

Deathtouch
Exhaust – {13}{B}{B}: Put three +1/+1 counters on Void Fiend. Each opponent loses 3 life, sacrifices a nonland permanent, and discards a card. If your life total is less than your starting life total, this ability costs {X} less to activate, where X is the difference. [i](Activate each exhaust ability only once.)[/i]

Reach
When Huntress enters, she deals 1 damage to any target.
Whenever Huntress becomes blocked, she deals 1 damage to any target.

Vigilance
Whenever Captain enters or attacks, reveal the top four cards of your library. You may exile a artifact card from among them. If it has mana value equal to or less then the number of nonland permanents you control, you may put it onto the battlefield. Otherwise, put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.
Station [i](Tap another creature you control: Put charge counters equal to its power on this Spacecraft. Station only as a sorcery.)[/i]

Whenever you cast a spell, put a +1/+1 counter on Railgunner. 
Whenever Railgunner attacks, put a stun counter on her. 
Exhaust[i] [/i]– {10}: Railgunner deals 5 damage to any target. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each +1/+1 counter on Railgunner. Activate only as a sorcery. [i](Activate each exhaust ability only once.)[/i]

Whenever Acrid deals combat damage to a player, you gain 3 life and you draw a card. 
Whenever a creature you control becomes blocked, the defending player gets two poison counters. [i](A player with ten or more poison counters loses the game.)[/i]

At the beginning of your first main phase, choose one or more–
• Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. You lose 1 life. 
• Target player adds {B}{G}. You lose 2 life. 
• Return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. You lose 3 life.

Enchant permanent

{3}: Put a +1/+1 counter on MUL-T.

{T}, Sacrifice a nonland permanent: You draw a card and you lose 1 life.

When this enchantment enters, exile the top four cards of your library. 
At the beginning of your upkeep, target opponent chooses a card exiled with this enchantment. Put that card into your hand. Then if there are no cards exiled with this enchantment, exile the top four cards of your library.

Choose one: 
• Brotherhood's End deals 3 damage to each creature and each planeswalker.
• Destroy all artifacts with mana value 3 or less.

Whenever an artifact you control deals combat damage to a player, you may exile it. Return it to the battlefield at the beginning of your next main phase. When you do, add {C}{C}. This mana can't be spent to cast a nonartifact spell. 
{1}{U}, {T}: Target artifact you control gains flying and becomes a 3/3 creature in addition to its other types until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

Whenever Drifter enters or attacks, if you don't control a Junk token, create one. [i](It's an artifact with “{T}, Sacrifice this token: Exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn. Activate only as a sorcery.”)[/i]
Permanent spells you cast from exile cost {2} less. When you cast a permanent spell this way, it gains haste and “At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice this.”

Haunt [i](When this creature dies, exile it haunting target creature.)[/i]
When Kur-skan enters or deals combat damage to a player, you draw a card and you lose 1 life.
Whenever the haunted creature deals combat damage to a opponent, its controller sacrifices it. If they do, return Kur-skan to the battlefield.

Lifelink
When Providence enters, if he was cast, search your library for a non-Cyclops creature card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. If you do, destroy all other creatures with power greater than the revealed card.

cards.rules_text:
Whenever you cast a spell, put a +1/+1 counter on Seeker if that spell's mana value is even and your choice of a first strike, lifelink, or flying counter on her if that spell's mana value is odd.
As long as Seeker has four or more counters on her, you can't lose the game and your opponents can't win the game.
{T}: Add {C}{C}.

When Mithrix enters, for each opponent, exile target permanent that player controls until Mithrix leaves the battlefield.
Whenever Mithrix attacks, the defending player exiles a permanent they control until Mithrix leaves the battlefield. 
Mithrix has the activated and triggered abilities of each card exiled with him.
{T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice Prismatic Vista: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle your library.
